evidence_summary: GAP-P08-001 and GAP-P14-001 require one readiness service; GAP-P14-002 requires event spine and containment triggers.

evidence_summary: Wave 5 requires quality holds, inventory ledger, genealogy, MES readiness and execution gates.

evidence_summary: JO/WO/MES execution is JSON primary/partial; maintenance/calibration notes work can run on invalid machine/tool/gage until readiness is implemented.

evidence_summary: ReleaseWorkOrder requires machine active, tool/gage calibrated, operator qualified, NC program released and material available; CompleteOperation requires inspection and quality gates.

evidence_summary: quality_holds and trigger/trace link authority were added in P33.
